calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing.

Dept. 204. Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288. Clerk: Ella Yip/Rosie Noguaera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne/A. Whitehead.

Petitioner: Lucille McGee appeared in Propria Persona.
Respondent: Pecola Jones appeared in Propria Persona.
Claudia Sepulveda Adult Protective Services Social Worker, Chanelle Harris, Patience McKitric Williams Brown were also present.

All Parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court denied the request for a protective order with respect to Lucille McGee based in part with Ms. Jones' commitment to move out. The Court informed the Parties that this is not the correct forum for Landlord/Tenant or eviction matters.
